visual_base.visual_narrative_log: (1) Three women in casual attire are kneeling on a white marble-patterned floor in a bright, modern office studio. They are playfully interacting with a small, fluffy white dog and several plush toys, including a brown dinosaur and a purple octopus. (2) A man wearing a multi-colored patchwork jacket and denim jeans walks into the scene from the right. The women react with mock panic, attempting to hide the dog and the toys while laughing. A large, colorful mascot statue stands prominently in the background. (3) The man gestures toward a wet spot on the floor, engaging in a lively, expressive conversation with the women. The lighting is bright and even, highlighting the clean environment. (4) A fourth woman in a grey-and-black striped shirt enters the frame. The group stands or crouches around the wet spot, continuing their animated discussion with high facial expressiveness and hand gestures. (5) One woman begins cleaning the floor with a white mop while the others look on. The camera uses a medium shot to capture the group interaction. (6) A sharp transition shows a close-up of two clear spray bottles labeled 'PuriUP' against a white background. The bottles contain a light green liquid and feature a cat illustration. (7) A sequence of quick cuts shows the woman in the striped shirt demonstrating the spray on various household surfaces: a grey sofa, a green checkered rug, a pet bed, and spraying it into the air in a minimalist living room. (8) The man and the woman in the striped shirt stand together, each holding a bottle and smiling broadly at the camera in a professional studio setting. (9) The final scene features four bottles lined up on a marble table. A white cat quickly runs across the background as text overlays appear.
visual_base.text_narrative_log: (1) [Subtitle]: 好痛. [Logo]: Da tou fo. (2) [Subtitle]: 老闆來了. [Slogan]: 大頭佛株式會社. (3) [Subtitle]: 沒事沒事. [Subtitle]: 有人說可以把你家的寵物毛小孩狗狗帶到辦公室嗎. (4) [Subtitle]: 沒有狗! 沒有狗! (5) [Subtitle]: 我眼睛業障重嗎 沒有狗? (6) [Subtitle]: 這是什麼來 這你尿的? (7) [Subtitle]: 不是說我們不通人情說不能把毛小孩帶來這個辦公室. (8) [Subtitle]: 我不care嘛 是我們那個老闆娘他會care他有潔癖. (9) [Subtitle]: 我馬上清. (10) [Subtitle]: 他不喜歡嘛 我是沒差 要帶就帶. (11) [Subtitle]: 你看那麼可愛對不對 什麼味道. (12) [Subtitle]: 沒有沒有 梅子尿尿. (13) [Subtitle]: 你扛啊 對不起對不起 我馬上清. (14) [Subtitle]: 早說嘛 用清水擦是不夠的. (15) [Slogan]: 植淨日常 雙醇抗菌消臭噴霧. (16) [Subtitle]: 萃取200多種 植萃複方 不怕毛小孩舔食. (17) [Subtitle]: 新式技術 包覆分解各種難纏的異味. (18) [Subtitle]: 添加獨特蛋白酵素 深入縫隙清潔尿臭. (19) [Variety]: 有醇 更有效. (20) [Subtitle]: 森林淨香就像乾淨清爽的雨後森林 是寵物友善的無毒木質香氛. (21) [Subtitle]: 地板 地毯 沙發 睡床 貓砂 玩具及紡織品都可以噴喔. (22) [Subtitle]: 讚啦 來啦 這罐拿回去用. (23) [Subtitle]: 剛才是綠茶. (24) [Subtitle]: 讓家裡跟毛小孩 都可以香噴噴. (25) [Subtitle]: 現在購買呢 還有專屬優惠. (26) [Subtitle]: 植淨日常家用清潔系列 任選2件9折. (27) [Subtitle]: 留言再抽 全系列產品!!. (28) [Subtitle]: 謝謝老闆娘.

visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: A male with brown hair wearing a vibrant blue, green, and black patchwork jacket. A female with long black hair wearing a grey and black striped sweatshirt.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: A modern office with white marble flooring, grey walls, and professional studio lighting. A secondary location depicts a clean, minimalist home interior with a grey sofa and wooden accents.

audio_base.audio_narrative_log: (1) High-energy female laughter and playful chatter dominate the mix. Sound of soft physical impacts on a floor suggests group activity. (2) A bright, upbeat pop BGM with a steady drum beat and acoustic guitar enters. A clear, friendly male voice greets the group. (3) Fast-paced conversational dialogue follows, punctuated by sudden laughter and high-pitched vocal exclamations. (4) A distinctive 'whoosh' sound effect marks a transition. The male voice shifts to a rhythmic, slightly exaggerated narrative style, detailing a scenario. (5) A sharp, hissing sound of a spray bottle is heard repeatedly, synced with visual demonstrations. The BGM remains energetic in the background. (6) A technical, informative voice-over provides product details with clear articulation and moderate speed. (7) The BGM swells slightly for the conclusion, ending with a warm closing statement and a bright musical stinger.

narrative_and_purpose.narrativeStructure: Linear: Hook -> Problem -> Solution -> Demonstration -> CTA
narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: To promote the 'PuriUP' pet-friendly antibacterial and deodorizing spray by showcasing its effectiveness in cleaning pet accidents in a humorous, relatable office setting.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: The video explicitly names the product, demonstrates its features, and provides a discount code/offer at the end.

high_inference.freeDescribe: The video uses a popular comedic trope (hiding a pet from a boss) to transition naturally into a product demonstration, making the advertisement feel like social-native content.
